P32M_APB_V14_20080320

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 755
Recv ID: 775
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 0D
Func Name: APB

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "13",
    "supplier": "AFJ",
    "soft": "B400",
    "version": "2000"
  }
]

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Code DIAG": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Code ITG": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° SW": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N°Calibration": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
